summary: Step 1 scans directories in parallel with a live queue showing active workers.
introduced: Directory queue panel listing identified folders with active, done, and pending status
Workers stat showing how many parallel scans are running
changed: Fast volume scans split Users into per-folder tasks and index them concurrently
System folders continue to size in parallel with up to 8 workers
Scan progress reports active concurrency and completed directory count
fixed: Current path panel keeps a stable height so deep paths no longer jitter the layout
